form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (35.39) when sixth over 595m at Sandown in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from nine starts. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Strong performance after racing just off the speed to win by a neck at Ballarat over 545m (30.86) beating Hurricane Bert in Grade 4/5 on March 18. Has a solid record from this draw, including seven wins. Expected to go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance after racing just off the speed to win by a neck at Ballarat over 545m (30.86) beating Hurricane Bert in Grade 4/5 on March 18. Has a solid record from this draw, including seven wins. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at his last couple, most recently over 500m at this track in a handy 27.86 beating It's Mikado Time. Can bring up a hat-trick.

form.formComment: Put a space on them to win by 11 lengths at Sandown over 595m (34.36) beating His Special in Grade 5 on April 2. Tested under these conditions.

form.formComment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but he does have a good record at the track and trip, including two wins. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 3.5 lengths over 500m at this track in a handy 27.96, beating In A Bit. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at her last four starts, the latest when second (29.51) at Sandown. Drawn wide. Deserves respect.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (29.88) when fourth over 515m at Sandown in a Grade 5. Has one win and four placings from seven starts from the draw. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 5.5 lengths over 500m at this track in a handy (27.87), beating Larni Lou. In sparkling form and must be included.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 500m in 28.19. Followed that up with a minor placing over 500m at this track at Grade 5 FIN nine days ago. Others favoured this time.
